title: Flat Workbench
description: An elegant and compact workbench that will fit into any workbench interior or exterior!
body:
## 🌍 General description Have you noticed which vanilla crafting table is not universal in terms of design? If so, then this simple mod is for you!
## 🔥 The main ideas of fashion
🔹 The mod adds a workbench that will look beautiful everywhere!
🔹 A unique combination with other decorations!
🔹 Simple crafting and easy to use!
## Special thanks to MCreator for a convenient modding platform!
